improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/images/gideon-og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Assistant for Trade & Business">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI for business owners and traders. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: Search engines display meta descriptions in results, directly influencing click-through rates. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags control how the page appears when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, and X—critical channels for reaching business professionals. These tags clearly communicate the product name, AI capability, free trial offer, and low entry price, improving both organic search visibility and social share conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for business owners and professionals. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clearly defines what it is, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights the three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while addressing the target audience directly. The free trial CTA with 'no card required' reduces friction and increases conversion by lowering perceived risk.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the trial-to-paid conversion moment, reducing friction by setting clear expectations. It reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace) and highlights the affordable entry point and annual savings—key decision factors for cost-conscious business owners.
